Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ANDY TRAN, DAVID HOPPER and OUTCO, INC.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)
